🧠 Nous Research Releases Contrastive Neuron Attribution (CNA): Sparse MLP Circuit Steering Without SAE Training or Weight Modification.
📊 Nous Research releases CNA, a method that steers LLM behavior by ablating sparse MLP circuits without training or weight modification.
🔬 The main benchmark was JBB-Behaviors , a NeurIPS 2024 benchmark of 100 harmful prompts.
